### Post by Tekno_Cowboy on 2007-10-30
I had this problem too, try searching for how to enable compiz, or go to the compiz fusion website. There are detailed directions, and it lets you know what options need to be enabled on some nVidia cards. I think your problem is that these options are disabled.

---

### Post by darkenemy on 2007-10-30
compiz works...its the window decorator that is the problem

all other features of compiz run just fine (lest water effects.. but i dont care about that)
